expires_today.title: 4X: Xplore, Xpand, Xploit, Xterminate
expires_today.description: Your rise to greatness will be documented
expires_today.long_description:
Explore dynamic maps, expand your territory, exploit the environment for resources, and exterminate anything that interferes with a massive collection of 4X games! Lead armies and rise to greatness in Songs of Silence, a visually stunning adventure filled with intense battles and captivating stories, build an unrivaled empire and flex your galactic greatness in pure 64-bit awesomeness with Distant Worlds 2, and more! Pay what you want for epic 4X fun and help support Direct Relief with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 12th, 2027.

expires_today.title: The Claude Code Mastery Bundle by Zenva
expires_today.long_description: Develop software faster and learn the AI workflows modern developers are rapidly adopting with The Claude Code Mastery Bundle. Build full-stack AI apps with Next.js and Python, integrate Stripe subscriptions and modern LLM APIs, automate workflows with MCP and GitHub, and learn how to run fully private local AI systems with Ollama and OpenCode—all in one amazing bundle! Pay what you want for a masterclass collection from Zenva and support Alzheimer’s Research UK while building skills that can immediately improve how you develop software.

expires_today.title: Infinite Dread: Horror Comics by Oni Press
expires_today.long_description: Superheroes are all well and good, but oftentimes horror is where comics really shine. To bring you the spookiest stories the medium has to offer, we’ve teamed up with Oni Press for a selection of comics that are sure to keep you up at night! Something horrifically weird is going on and no one will talk about it in Hobtown Mystery Stories. A startling new experiment in comic book storytelling inspired by firsthand accounts of real paranormal encounters awaits in High Strangeness. And you're only alive if you're online in Cemetery Kids Don't Die. There’s even more to explore in this ghoulish library of haunts, so grab it now at the price of your choosing, and support BINC with your purchase!

expires_tomorrow.title: Spring Into Creativity
expires_tomorrow.long_description: Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.

expires_within_72h.title: Data Visualization & Storytelling by Wiley
expires_within_72h.long_description: Show—don’t tell—when you integrate storytelling into your data to help paint a broader picture. Unlock eBooks from leading authors in the space, like the For Dummies team, and awesome titles like Cool Infographics: Effective Communication with Data Visualization and Design, Data Points: Visualization That Means Something, and Data-Driven Security: Analysis, Visualization and Dashboards. Pay what you want for a powerful collection of data visualization and storytelling eBooks from some of the biggest names in tech, and help support the Electronic Frontier Foundation!

expires_within_72h.title: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle by Packt
expires_within_72h.description: Defend your sensitive data with AI
expires_within_72h.long_description: Nothing gets past our latest Humble Video Learning Bundle: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle! Learn how to protect your digital world using AI defensive tactics with exceptional courses from Packt. Prepare for your new career with video learning courses like Cybersecurity Fundamentals & Certification Prep – ISC2 Pathway, Mastering Cybersecurity with Python - From Basics to Advanced Defense, AZ-500 - Microsoft Azure Security Technologies - A Prep Course, more. Go from zero to cybersecurity hero, and help support the Starlight Foundation with your purchase!

expires_within_72h.title: The Ultimate Functional Programming by Pragmatic Programmers
expires_within_72h.long_description: Start creating with a function-focused mindset with the all-new Functional Programming Bundle by Pragmatic Programmers. Learn to execute a variety of functions to save time and energy for yourself, a business, or a new programming hobby. Unlock cornerstone eBooks like Domain Modeling Made Functional, Programming Clojure Fourth Edition, From Objects to Functions, and more. Get practical resources for novice coders and seasoned pros, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!
